steps.title: Separate two complete clauses
steps.content: The words before the blank form a complete clause: the three works have won the World Fantasy Award. The words after the blank also form a complete clause: the works received the honor in specific categories.

steps.title: Use a semicolon boundary
steps.content: A creates a comma splice between two independent clauses. C adds and without the comma needed before a coordinating conjunction. D leaves the two clauses fused with no punctuation. A semicolon correctly links the two complete clauses. The answer is B.
